title: ffi: missing pad/unpad breaks CLI interop
description: ffi/src/api/client.rs encode_chat_payload() calls serde_json::to_vec but never messages::pad(). decode_payload_text() tries serde_json::from_slice on raw payload bytes but never calls messages::unpad() first. CLI always pads outgoing messages with a 4-byte length prefix. Result: Flutter/Dart client cannot decode messages from CLI (fails JSON parse on padded bytes), and CLI cannot decode messages from Flutter (unpadded payloads). Same root cause as the WASM bug (nie-8wfc.14) but in a separate crate.
